title: Jet Freight Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jet Freight Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!
